niches.label: Daily Micro-Savings / $5-a-Day Deposit Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — 'save $1 a day' challenges are consistently viral. Round-up apps (Acorns) focus on automation, not habit streaks. Gap: accountability for INTENTIONAL daily savings action.
niches.notes: No niche-specific apps found in iTunes search

niches.label: Daily Expense Logging / Manual Budget Tracking Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — many people want manual awareness not automation. YNAB/Mint auto-import. The gap: an app that rewards you JUST for logging daily, no automation required. Behavior change, not tracking.

niches.label: No-Spend Day / Spend-Free Day Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — 'no spend day challenges' are viral (TikTok, Reddit). No dedicated streak app. YNAB tracks budget, not streak accountability. Massive overlap with frugal community.
niches.notes: No niche-specific apps found in iTunes search

niches.label: Daily LinkedIn Content Posting Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — 'post on LinkedIn daily for 30 days' is now a professional growth trope. Buffer/Hootsuite are schedulers, not streak accountability tools. Clear gap for a simple LinkedIn habit tracker.
niches.notes: No niche-specific apps found in iTunes search

niches.label: Weekly Debt Paydown / Extra Payment Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — debt payoff community is massive (r/debtfree 400K). Debt apps (Undebt.it, Debt Payoff Planner) are calculators/trackers not streak/habit tools. Emotional accountability gap.

niches.label: Daily / Weekly DCA (Dollar-Cost Averaging) Investment Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — DCA is the most recommended investing strategy. Brokerage apps (Robinhood, Fidelity) are execution tools, not habit streak trackers. Gap: accountability for consistent contribution habit.
niches.notes: No niche-specific apps found in iTunes search

niches.label: Daily Photography / One Photo a Day Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — 365 photo projects are extremely popular. Instagram tracks posting, not intent/streak. Gap: a minimalist daily photography streak app separate from social media posting.
niches.notes: No niche-specific apps found in iTunes search

niches.label: Daily Plant-Based / Meat-Free Meal Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — 'Meatless Monday' + 'Veganuary' trend. Cronometer/MyFitnessPal are calorie trackers. Gap: simple streak tracker for plant-based meals, separate from calorie counting.

niches.label: Daily Professional Networking / Cold Outreach Email Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — career coaches universally recommend '5 networking emails/week'. CRMs (HubSpot, Apollo) are complex. Gap: a simple streak tracker for daily networking effort. High willingness-to-pay (career ROI).

niches.label: Daily Drawing / Sketching Practice Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — 'draw every day for 30 days' is the most repeated art advice. Procreate/Adobe Fresco are tools, not streak trackers. Gap: accountability layer specifically for daily art practice.

niches.label: Daily 10K Steps / Walking Goal Streak
niches.hypothesis: SOFT — Apple Health/Fitbit count steps. But they track continuously not habit streaks. Gap may be marginal. Check iTunes carefully for dedicated 'did I hit my steps goal today' streak apps.

niches.label: Daily Music Practice / Instrument Session Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — teachers universally say '20 min daily practice beats 2h weekly'. GarageBand/Yousician are tools not habit trackers. Gap: instrument-agnostic daily practice streak accountability.

niches.label: Weekly Portfolio / GitHub / Personal Brand Update Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — 'update your portfolio' is universal career advice that never gets done. GitHub tracks commits but not portfolio curation. Gap: weekly streak for portfolio/personal brand actions.
niches.notes: No niche-specific apps found in iTunes search

niches.label: No Single-Use Plastic / Plastic-Free Day Streak
niches.hypothesis: BO — Plastic Free July challenge is global. Zero waste apps (Olio, Too Good To Go) are swap/food-sharing, not habit tracking. Gap: streak tracker for daily plastic avoidance.
niches.notes: No niche-specific apps found in iTunes search

niches.label: Daily Professional Certification Study Streak (AWS / PMP / CFA)
niches.hypothesis: BO — exam prep requires daily habit. Anki covers flashcards. Study apps (Magoosh, PrepAway) are content not streak tracking. Gap: general certification streak tracker with milestone rewards.
